All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

allowInjectedFields() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
When true (default), fields annotated with Spring/Jakarta injection annotations (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are exempt from the non-final-field check.
allowInjectedFields() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
When true (default), injection-annotated fields (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are not flagged.
allowInjectedFields(boolean) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
Control whether fields annotated with Spring/Jakarta injection annotations are exempted.
allowThreadLocalFields() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are exempt.
allowThreadLocalFields() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are not flagged.
allowThreadLocalFields(boolean) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
Control whether ThreadLocal fields are exempted.
AnalysisResult - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model
The complete result of a stateful-bean analysis run across one or more packages.
AnalysisResult(List<BeanViolation>, int) - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.AnalysisResult
 
analyze(Class<?>, String, StatefulBeanCheckConfig) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.BeanClassAnalyzer
Analyses clazz and returns a BeanViolation if any statefulness issues are found, or Optional.empty() if clean.
analyzeClass(Class<?>) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.LombokClassAnalyzer
Returns class-level ViolationTypes related to Lombok on the given class.
analyzeFields(Class<?>, StatefulBeanCheckConfig) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.FieldAnalyzer
 
analyzeSetters(Class<?>, StatefulBeanCheckConfig) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.SetterMethodAnalyzer
 
AnnotationNames - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util
Centralised string constants for annotation class names used across the library.
AUTOWIRED - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 

B

BEAN_MAP_KEY - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.extension.StatefulBeanCheckExtension
 
BeanClassAnalyzer - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer
Orchestrates all sub-analysers against a single bean class and produces an optional BeanViolation.
BeanClassAnalyzer() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.BeanClassAnalyzer
 
BeanViolation - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model
Aggregates all violations found on a single Spring Bean class.
BeanViolation(String, String, List<FieldViolation>, List<ViolationType>) - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation
 
beforeAll(ExtensionContext) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.extension.StatefulBeanCheckExtension
 
beforeAll(ExtensionContext) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.extension.SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension
 
build() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
builder() - Static method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 

C

checkBeans(Map<String, Class<?>>) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.StatefulBeanChecker
Analyses a pre-supplied map of bean names to bean classes (e.g. from a Spring ApplicationContext).
checkPackages() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.StatefulBeanChecker
Scans configured packages on the classpath, filters to Spring-annotated classes, and analyses each one.
ClasspathPackageScanner - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer
Scans the current classpath for classes in the given packages, without requiring a Spring ApplicationContext.
ClasspathPackageScanner() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.ClasspathPackageScanner
 
ClasspathPackageScanner(ClassLoader) - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.ClasspathPackageScanner
 
Combined with Spring Boot test - Search tag in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Section

CONFIGURATION - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
CONTROLLER - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames

E

equals(Object) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 
excludeAnnotations() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Fully-qualified annotation names — classes carrying any of these annotations will be skipped.
excludeAnnotations() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
Fully-qualified annotation names — bean classes carrying any of these will be skipped.
excludeAnnotations(String...) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
Exclude classes carrying any of the given annotation types.
excludeClasses() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Specific fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
excludeClasses() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
Fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
excludeClasses(Class<?>...) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
excludeClassNames(String...) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
ExcludeFromStatefulCheck - Annotation Interface in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.annotation
Marks a Spring Bean class or a specific field as deliberately excluded from the stateful-bean check.
excludePackages() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Packages to exclude from scanning (prefix match).
excludePackages(String...) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
extractUserBeans(ApplicationContext) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.context.SpringBeanExtractor
Extracts all user-defined bean classes from the context.

F

failOnViolation() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
When true, the test fails if any violations are found.
failOnViolation() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
When true (default), the test fails on violations.
FieldAnalyzer - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer
Inspects the declared fields of a class and produces FieldViolations for any field that represents mutable state unsuitable for a shared Spring Bean.
FieldAnalyzer() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.FieldAnalyzer
 
FieldViolation - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model
Represents a single field-level statefulness violation detected on a Spring Bean class.
FieldViolation(String, String, ViolationType, String) - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 

G

getBeanClassName() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation
 
getBeanName() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation

getDescription() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 
getExcludedAnnotations() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig

getExcludedPackages() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 
getFieldName() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 
getFieldTypeName() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 
getFieldViolations() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation
 
getPackagesToScan() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 
getTotalBeansScanned() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.AnalysisResult
 
getViolations() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.AnalysisResult
 
getViolationType() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 

H

hashCode() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation

hasViolations() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation
 

I

INJECT - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
INJECTION_ANNOTATIONS - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
Annotations that indicate a field is an injection point, not mutable state.
isAllowInjectedFields() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 
isAllowThreadLocalFields() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 
isLombokAware() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig
 
isLombokImmutable(Class<?>) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.LombokClassAnalyzer
Returns true if the class carries @lombok.Value, which Lombok uses to generate an immutable value class (all fields final, no setters).
isSpringBeanClass(Class<?>) - Static method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.BeanClassAnalyzer
Returns true if the class carries at least one Spring Bean stereotype annotation (used when scanning packages without a live context).

L

LOMBOK_BUILDER - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
LOMBOK_DATA - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Class carries Lombok @Data which generates setters for every field.
LOMBOK_DATA - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
LOMBOK_GETTER - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
LOMBOK_MUTABLE_CLASS_ANNOTATIONS - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
Lombok annotations that imply mutability at the class level.
LOMBOK_SETTER - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Class or field carries Lombok @Setter.
LOMBOK_SETTER - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
LOMBOK_SINGULAR - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
LOMBOK_SINGULAR_BUILDER - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Class carries Lombok @Builder with @Singular mutable accumulator fields left accessible after construction.
LOMBOK_VALUE - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
lombokAware() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
When true, Lombok @Data and @Setter on a bean class are treated as violations.
lombokAware() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation.SpringStatefulBeanTest
Enable Lombok-aware detection (@Data, @Setter, etc.).
lombokAware(boolean) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
Enable Lombok-aware detection of @Data, @Setter, etc.
LombokClassAnalyzer - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer
Detects Lombok annotations at the class level that imply generated mutability.
LombokClassAnalyzer() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.LombokClassAnalyzer
 

M

MANAGED_BEAN - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
MUTABLE_COLLECTION_FIELD - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Field type is a mutable collection (List, Map, Set, etc.) and is not wrapped in an unmodifiable view or declared as an immutable type.
MUTABLE_SETTER - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Field has a public or package-private setter method that is not a Spring setter-injection method.

N

NAMED - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
NON_FINAL_FIELD - Enum constant in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Field is not final and is not a recognised injection point (@Autowired, @Inject, @Value, @Resource).

P

packages() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Packages to scan for Spring-annotated bean classes.
packages(String...) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config.StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
Package-scan usage (no Spring context) - Search tag in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation.StatefulBeanCheck
Section

R

reason() - Element in annotation interface dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.annotation.ExcludeFromStatefulCheck
Human-readable justification for the exclusion.
REPOSITORY - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
RESOURCE - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
REST_CONTROLLER - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 

S

scanPackage(String) - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.ClasspathPackageScanner
Returns all classes found under the given package (recursively).
SERVICE - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
SetterMethodAnalyzer - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer
Detects public/package-private setter methods on a bean class that are not Spring setter-injection points.
SetterMethodAnalyzer() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.analyzer.SetterMethodAnalyzer
 
SPRING_BEAN_ANNOTATIONS - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
All annotations that mark a class as a Spring-managed bean.
SpringBeanExtractor - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.context
Extracts a beanName → beanClass map from a live Spring ApplicationContext, filtering out infrastructure beans that are not user-authored (framework internals, Spring Boot auto-configuration, etc.).
SpringBeanExtractor() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.context.SpringBeanExtractor
 
SpringStatefulBeanTest - Annotation Interface in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation
Composite annotation for running stateful-bean checks against a live Spring ApplicationContext.
SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.extension
JUnit 5 extension that backs SpringStatefulBeanTest.
SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.extension.SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension
 
StatefulBeanCheck - Annotation Interface in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation
Marks a JUnit 5 test class as a stateful-bean check.
StatefulBeanCheckConfig - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config
Immutable configuration for a stateful-bean check run.
StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.config
 
StatefulBeanChecker - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core
Primary entry point for stateful-bean analysis.
StatefulBeanChecker(StatefulBeanCheckConfig) - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.StatefulBeanChecker
 
StatefulBeanCheckExtension - Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.extension
JUnit 5 extension that executes the stateful-bean check before any test methods run in the annotated class.
StatefulBeanCheckExtension() - Constructor for class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.extension.StatefulBeanCheckExtension
 
STORE_NAMESPACE - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.extension.StatefulBeanCheckExtension
ExtensionContext store key used by the Spring integration module to register the ApplicationContext bean map so this extension can pick it up without a hard Spring compile-time dependency.

T

toFailureMessage() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.AnalysisResult
Formats a human-readable failure message suitable for test assertion output.
toString() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.BeanViolation
 
toString() - Method in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.FieldViolation
 

V

VALUE - Static variable in class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
 
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model.ViolationType
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
ViolationType - Enum Class in dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.model
Describes why a field or class was flagged as a statefulness violation.
